description_long: This is a dark-colored frying pan with a deep, rounded bowl and a long, straight handle. The pan appears to be made of cast iron or a similar heavy metal, giving it a robust and durable appearance. The handle is solid and tapers slightly towards the end, with no visible grip texture or covering. The rim of the pan is thick and features a small pouring spout on one side, allowing for easy transfer of liquids. The surface of the pan is matte and slightly rough, suggesting a seasoned or unfinished cast iron finish. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, and the bottom of the pan appears smooth without any distinct patterns or ridges.
description: A deep, dark cast iron frying pan with a long, straight handle and a thick rim featuring a pouring spout. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible branding or bottom pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight handle and the deep, rounded bowl of the pan.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the pan and the pouring spout on the rim.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the bowl, with the spout less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the interior of the pan, with the spout visible on the rim.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, solid cast iron handle with a slight taper and no visible grip texture or covering.
attribute_rim_design: Thick, straight rim with a single pouring spout; no flaring or reinforcement visible.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with no visible pattern, ridges, or markings.
